'''ân-l-m''' ('''nalama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moonball|moonball]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moonball|moonball]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-l-m
|-
! Lemma
| nalama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nalamithi|nalamithi]] || [[word:nalamiji|nalamiji]] || [[word:nalamishi|nalamishi]] || [[word:nalami|nalami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalamuthuth|nalamuthuth]] || [[word:nalamujuj|nalamujuj]] || [[word:nalamushush|nalamushush]] || [[word:nalam|nalam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalamuthu|nalamuthu]] || [[word:nalamuju|nalamuju]] || [[word:nalamushu|nalamushu]] || [[word:nalamu|nalamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalamufuth|nalamufuth]] || [[word:nalamufuj|nalamufuj]] || [[word:nalamufush|nalamufush]] || [[word:nalamuf|nalamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nalamethe|nalamethe]] || [[word:nalameje|nalameje]] || [[word:nalameshe|nalameshe]] || [[word:nalame|nalame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalamothoth|nalamothoth]] || [[word:nalamojoj|nalamojoj]] || [[word:nalamoshosh|nalamoshosh]] || [[word:nalam|nalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalamotho|nalamotho]] || [[word:nalamojo|nalamojo]] || [[word:nalamosho|nalamosho]] || [[word:nalamo|nalamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalamofoth|nalamofoth]] || [[word:nalamofoj|nalamofoj]] || [[word:nalamofosh|nalamofosh]] || [[word:nalamof|nalamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nalamĂŠthĂŠ|nalamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nalamĂŠjĂŠ|nalamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nalamĂŠshĂŠ|nalamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nalamĂŠ|nalamĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalamathath|nalamathath]] || [[word:nalamajaj|nalamajaj]] || [[word:nalamashash|nalamashash]] || [[word:nalam|nalam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalamatha|nalamatha]] || [[word:nalamaja|nalamaja]] || [[word:nalamasha|nalamasha]] || [[word:nalama|nalama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalamafath|nalamafath]] || [[word:nalamafaj|nalamafaj]] || [[word:nalamafash|nalamafash]] || [[word:nalamaf|nalamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nalamasha|nalamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonalamasha|gonalamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinalamasha|gokinalamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nalamnĂŒsha|nalamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonalamnknĂŒsha|gonalamnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinalamnĂŒsha|gokinalamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nalamshĂ«sha|nalamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonalamnkshĂ«sha|gonalamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinalamshĂ«sha|gokinalamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nalamrosha|nalamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonalamnkrosha|gonalamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinalamrosha|gokinalamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nalamusha|nalamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonalamnkmusha|gonalamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinalamusha|gokinalamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nalamsherasha|nalamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonalamnksherasha|gonalamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinalamsherasha|gokinalamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nalamngasha|nalamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonalamnkngasha|gonalamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinalamngasha|gokinalamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nalamyasha|nalamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonalamnkyasha|gonalamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinalamyasha|gokinalamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nalamyamasha|nalamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonalamnkyamasha|gonalamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinalamyamasha|gokinalamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nalamnĂŒshĂ«sha|nalamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonalamnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gonalamnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinalamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokinalamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nalamnĂŒrosha|nalamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonalamnknĂŒrosha|gonalamnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinalamnĂŒrosha|gokinalamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nalamnĂŒmusha|nalamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonalamnknĂŒmusha|gonalamnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinalamnĂŒmusha|gokinalamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nalamshĂ«nĂŒsha|nalamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonalamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gonalamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinalamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokinalamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nalamshĂ«rosha|nalamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonalamnkshĂ«rosha|gonalamnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinalamshĂ«rosha|gokinalamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nalamshĂ«musha|nalamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonalamnkshĂ«musha|gonalamnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinalamshĂ«musha|gokinalamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nalamronĂŒsha|nalamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonalamnkronĂŒsha|gonalamnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinalamronĂŒsha|gokinalamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nalamroshĂ«sha|nalamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonalamnkroshĂ«sha|gonalamnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinalamroshĂ«sha|gokinalamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nalamromusha|nalamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonalamnkromusha|gonalamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinalamromusha|gokinalamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nalamunĂŒsha|nalamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonalamnkmunĂŒsha|gonalamnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinalamunĂŒsha|gokinalamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nalamushĂ«sha|nalamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonalamnkmushĂ«sha|gonalamnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinalamushĂ«sha|gokinalamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nalamurosha|nalamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonalamnkmurosha|gonalamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinalamurosha|gokinalamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nalam|nalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŠlĂŠm|nĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honalam|honalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honĂŠlĂŠm|honĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonalam|hohonalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonĂŠlĂŠm|hohonĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒnalam|nĂŒnalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŠlĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnalam|nĂŒnĂŒnalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠlĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻnalam|nĂŻnalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŠlĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnalam|nĂŻnĂŻnalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠlĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunalam|lunalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunĂŠlĂŠm|lunĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunalam|lulunalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunĂŠlĂŠm|lulunĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linalam|linalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linĂŠlĂŠm|linĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinalam|lilinalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinĂŠlĂŠm|lilinĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konalam|konalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konĂŠlĂŠm|konĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonalam|kokonalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonĂŠlĂŠm|kokonĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenalam|kenalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenĂŠlĂŠm|kenĂŠlĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenalam|kekenalam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenĂŠlĂŠm|kekenĂŠlĂŠm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
